prompt: Take a screenshot of your screen, save it to ~/Desktop/kinbench/029-shot.png, then open Mail and create a new draft email with subject 'KinBench 029 Screenshot' that has that screenshot attached. Don't send the email — leave it as a draft. Fast path: cerebellum 'multi screenshot_to_mail "KinBench 029 Screenshot" "" ~/Desktop/kinbench/029-shot.png'.
